soal.teks: Siti meets her teacher at 08.00 AM. What should she say? (Latihan #1)
soal.pembahasan: 08.00 AM is in the morning, so the appropriate greeting is 'Good morning'.

soal.teks:
Budi: 'I have to go now. See you tomorrow.' 
Andi: '...' (Latihan #2)
soal.pembahasan: When someone says a parting phrase like 'See you tomorrow', the proper response is 'See you'.

soal.teks: If someone says 'Thank you for your help', the best response is... (Latihan #3)
soal.pembahasan: 'You're welcome' is the standard polite reply to 'Thank you'.

soal.teks:
A: 'What time is it?'
B: 'It is a quarter past seven.' 
The digital time to represent B's response is... (Latihan #4)
soal.pembahasan: 'A quarter' means 15 minutes. 'Past seven' means it is 15 minutes after 7 (07:15).

soal.teks: Today is Wednesday. What day was yesterday? (Latihan #5)
soal.pembahasan: Yesterday means 'kemarin'. The day before Wednesday is Tuesday.

soal.teks: Which of the following is an introduction? (Latihan #6)

opsi.A: Hi, my name is Lina. I am from Bandung.
opsi.B: I am so sorry for arriving late.
opsi.C: Could you pass me the salt?

soal.pembahasan: Introduction involves stating one's name and origin.
soal.trik: Look for 'My name is...' or 'I am...'

soal.teks: Elephants are big animals. They have long trunks and wide ears. This text is an example of... (Latihan #7)
soal.pembahasan: The text describes the physical characteristics of elephants, which makes it a descriptive text.

soal.teks:
A: 'Where do you live?'
B: '...' (Latihan #8)
soal.pembahasan: The question asks for a place/location (live). So, stating the address is correct.

soal.teks: The room is very ... I need to turn on the lamp. (Latihan #9)
soal.pembahasan: If you need to turn on the lamp, it means the room is lacking light (dark).
soal.trik: Turn on the lamp = The room is dark.

soal.teks: March is the ... month of the year. (Latihan #10)
soal.pembahasan: The months are: 1. January, 2. February, 3. March. March is the third month.
